---
title: "Research"
description: "Publications, academic profile, and CV of Marc Lemus-Canovas — synoptic climatology, extreme events, attribution, mountain climate."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

<style>
a.pill {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.12rem 0.12rem 0 0;
  padding: 0.12rem 0.6rem;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #5480a7;
  color: #fff !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  line-height: 1.5;
  transition: background-color 0.15s;
}
a.pill:hover {
  background-color: #56A754;
  color: #fff !important;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.pub-meta {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 0.3rem 0 1rem 0;
}
.altmetric-embed {
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center;
}
.metrics-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0.8rem 0;
}
.metric-box { text-align: center; }
.metric-box .value {
  font-size: 1.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5480a7;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.metric-box .label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #666;
}
.icon-links {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 0.8rem 0 1.2rem 0;
}
.icon-links a {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.75rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1.5px solid #5480a7;
  color: #5480a7 !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}
.icon-links a:hover {
  background: #5480a7;
  color: #fff !important;
}
ol li { margin-bottom: 0.15rem; }
</style>

My research focuses on understanding the link between **atmospheric dynamics** and **extreme meteorological events** — heatwaves, compound droughts, and extreme precipitation — with emphasis on the **European Alps** and **Mediterranean** region. I develop synoptic classification and attribution methods to quantify the role of climate change in shaping these extremes.

<div class="metrics-row">
<div class="metric-box"><div class="value">15</div><div class="label">h-index (Google Scholar)</div></div>
<div class="metric-box"><div class="value">677</div><div class="label">citations (Google Scholar)</div></div>
<div class="metric-box"><div class="value">32</div><div class="label">publications</div></div>
<div class="metric-box"><div class="value">13</div><div class="label">as first author</div></div>
</div>

<div class="icon-links">
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iOCaO7sAAAAJ" target="_blank"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i> Google Scholar</a>
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0925-3827" target="_blank"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i> ORCID</a>
<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Marc-Lemus-Canovas" target="_blank"><i class="ai ai-researchgate"></i> ResearchGate</a>
<a href="content/cv_lemus-canovas.pdf" target="_blank"><i class="fa fa-file-pdf"></i> Download CV (PDF)</a>
</div>

---

## Current Position

**Beatriu de Pinós Postdoctoral Fellow** · *since February 2026*  
Barcelona Supercomputing Center — Earth Sciences Department, Spain

---

## Previous Positions

| Period | Position | Institution |
|---|---|---|
| Oct 2024 – Feb 2026 | Seal of Excellence Postdoctoral Fellow | EURAC Research, Center for Climate Change and Transformation, Italy |
| Oct 2023 – Sep 2024 | Postdoctoral Researcher (Xunta de Galicia) + Visiting Postdoc | Univ. of Santiago de Compostela / EURAC Research, Italy |
| Oct 2022 – Sep 2023 | Postdoctoral Researcher (Xunta de Galicia) + Visiting Postdoc | Univ. of Santiago de Compostela / Andorra Research+Innovation |
| May 2022 – Aug 2022 | Postdoctoral Researcher | Andorra Research+Innovation |
| Nov 2021 – Feb 2022 | Adjunct Professor | University of Barcelona, Dept. of Geography |
| Oct 2018 – Oct 2021 | Predoctoral Researcher FPU | University of Barcelona, Dept. of Geography |
| Apr 2018 – Sep 2018 | Predoctoral Researcher APIF | University of Barcelona, Dept. of Geography |
| Oct 2017 – Nov 2017 | JAE-Intro Fellow | Spanish National Research Council, Institute of Geosciences |

*Research stays during PhD: University of Lisbon (3 mo), University of Porto (1 mo), University of Santiago de Compostela (1 mo). Scientific secondment: ETH Zurich — Hydrology & Climate Impacts in Mountain Regions Group (Sep–Dec 2025).*

---

## Education

**PhD in Geography** · University of Barcelona, Spain · 2022 *(Extraordinary Doctorate Prize)*  
**MSc in Remote Sensing and GIS** · Autonomous University of Barcelona, Spain · 2017  
**BSc in Geography** · University of Barcelona, Spain · 2016

---

## Research Projects

**As Principal Investigator:**

1. **HIPEAtMount** — Tailored attribution of high-impact precipitation events to anthropogenic climate change in mountain areas. Province of Bolzano/Bozen, Italy. 2024–2026. **€172,750**
2. **ATOC** — Heatwave attribution to climate change in Barcelona. Barcelona City Council. 2023–2024. **€24,500**

**As Collaborator:**

3. **EO4Multihazards** — Earth Observation for Multi-Hazard Risk Assessments. European Space Agency. PI: Terzi, S. 2023–2025. €1M (share €144,000 to EURAC)
4. **FutureMed** — Transdisciplinary network bridging climate science and societal impacts. COST. PI: Khodayar, S. 2023–2027
5. **EXE** — Compound dry and warm events in mainland Spain. Spanish Ministry of Science and Innovation. PI: Martin-Vide, J. 2021–2024. €66,500
6. **CLICES** — Climate of the last century in Spanish mainland. Spanish Ministry of Science and Innovation. PI: Martin-Vide, J. & Lopez-Bustins, J.A. 2018–2020. €78,000

**Contracts & Transfer:**

- Technical assistance for nivo-climatic regionalisation of the Pyrenees in Aragon — Diputación General de Aragón (PRE229-2021). Co-PI. €8,349. 2021
- Synoptic classification of daily surface O₃ concentration in Catalonia — Centre Internacional de Mètodes Numèrics en Enginyeria (FBG311161). €20,570. 2021–2022

---

## Awards & Distinctions

- **Beatriu de Pinós Fellowship** (2026) — Generalitat de Catalunya / Barcelona Supercomputing Center
- **Seal of Excellence** — Marie Skłodowska-Curie European Fellowship call
- **HIPEAtMount grant** (2024) — Province of Bolzano, Italy (€172,750)
- **International Eduard Fontserè Meteorology Prize** (€2,500)
- **Antoni M. Badia i Margarit Prize** (€1,600)
- **Extraordinary Doctorate Prize** — University of Barcelona, 2022
- **Best Poster Award** — 7th International Conference on Meteorology and Climatology of the Mediterranean (MetMed), 2019
- **FPU Predoctoral Fellowship** (FPU2017/02166) — Spanish Ministry of Education, 2018–2022

---

## Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles

<ol>

<li>
<p>Bonsoms, Josep, González-Herrero, Sergi, Fettweis, Xavier, <strong>Lemus-Cánovas, Marc</strong>, Oliva, Marc, &amp; López-Moreno, Juan I. (2026) "Record-breaking Greenland ice sheet melt events under recent and future climate" <em>Nature Communications</em>, 17, 3605. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5">10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Crespi, Alice, Maines, Elena, Terzi, Stefano, &amp; Pittore, Massimiliano. (2025) "More intense heatwaves under drier conditions: a compound event analysis in the Adige River basin (Eastern Italian Alps)" <em>Hydrology and Earth System Sciences</em>, 29, 6781–6809. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025">10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Albalat, A., Trapero, L., <strong>Lemus-Canovas, M.</strong>, &amp; Pons, M. (2025) "Characterizing past and current snow seasons through the application of a new multivariate snow index" <em>Journal of Hydrology</em>, 657, 133050. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050">10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Gonzalez-Herrero, Sergi, Trapero, Laura, Albalat, Anna, Insua-Costa, Damian, Senande-Rivera, Martin, &amp; Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo. (2025) "Exploring the interplay between observed warming, atmospheric circulation, and soil–atmosphere feedbacks on heatwaves in a temperate mountain region" <em>Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences</em>, 25, 2503–2518. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025">10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Martín-Vide, Javier, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Moreno-García, M. Carmen, Beguería, Santiago, Cordobilla, M. J., Balagué, Xavier, Cuscó, Eduard, Peña-Angulo, Dhais, <strong>Lemus, Marc</strong>, &amp; Trullenque, Víctor. (2025) "Spatial patterns of statistical relationship between the North Atlantic Oscillation and the Western Mediterranean Oscillation, and precipitation in Peninsular Spain" <em>Atmósfera</em>, 39. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.20937/atm.53490">10.20937/atm.53490</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.20937/atm.53490" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.20937/atm.53490" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Bonsoms, Josep, López-Moreno, Juan I., <strong>Lemus-Cánovas, Marc</strong>, &amp; Oliva, Marc. (2025) "Future winter snowfall and extreme snow events in the Pyrenees" <em>Atmospheric Research</em>, 315, 107912. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912">10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Llasat, María Carmen, Llasat-Botija, Montserrat, Pardo, Erika, Marcos-Matamoros, Raül, &amp; <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2024) "Floods in the Pyrenees: a global view through a regional database" <em>Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences</em>, 24, 3423–3443. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024">10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>González-Herrero, Sergi, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, &amp; Pereira, Paulo. (2024) "Climate change in cold regions" <em>Science of The Total Environment</em>, 933, 173127. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127">10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Insua-Costa, Damián, <strong>Lemus-Cánovas, Marc</strong>, González-Alemán, Juan J., Senande-Rivera, Martín, Llasat, María del Carmen, Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo, &amp; Miralles, Diego G. (2024) "Extraordinary 2021 snowstorm in Spain reveals critical threshold response to anthropogenic climate change" <em>Communications Earth &amp; Environment</em>, 5. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7">10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Montesinos-Ciuró, E., Cearreta-Innocenti, T., Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, &amp; Royé, Dominic. (2024) "Attribution of the unprecedented heat event of August 2023 in Barcelona (Spain) to observed and projected global warming" <em>Urban Climate</em>, 56, 102019. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019">10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Alonso-González, Esteban, Bonsoms, Josep, &amp; López-Moreno, Juan I. (2024) "Daily concentration of snowfalls in the mountains of the Iberian Peninsula" <em>International Journal of Climatology</em>, 44, 485–500. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.8338">10.1002/joc.8338</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1002/joc.8338" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.8338" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Insua-Costa, Damián, Trigo, Ricardo M., &amp; Miralles, Diego G. (2024) "Record-shattering 2023 Spring heatwave in western Mediterranean amplified by long-term drought" <em>npj Climate and Atmospheric Science</em>, 7. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6">10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Rodríguez, Oriol, &amp; <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2023) "Synoptic patterns triggering tornadic storms on the Iberian Peninsula and the Balearic Islands" <em>Atmospheric Research</em>, 285, 106634. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634">10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Miró, Juan Javier, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, Olcina Cantos, Jorge, Estrela, Maria J., Martin-Vide, Javier, Sarricolea, Pablo, &amp; Meseguer-Ruiz, Oliver. (2022) "A component-based approximation for trend detection of intense rainfall in the Spanish Mediterranean coast" <em>Weather and Climate Extremes</em>, 38, 100513. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513">10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Barrao, Samuel, Sarricolea, Pablo, Meseguer-Ruiz, Oliver, &amp; Tejedor, Ernesto. (2022) "Heat and cold waves in mainland Spain: Origins, characteristics, and trends" <em>Weather and Climate Extremes</em>, 37, 100471. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471">10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Sánchez-Almodóvar, Esther, Martin-Vide, Javier, Olcina-Cantos, Jorge, &amp; <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2022) "Are Atmospheric Situations Now More Favourable for Heavy Rainfall in the Spanish Mediterranean? Analysis of Episodes in the Alicante Province (1981–2020)" <em>Atmosphere</em>, 13(9), 1410. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos13091410">10.3390/atmos13091410</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.3390/atmos13091410" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos13091410" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Halifa-Marín, Amar, Torres-Vázquez, Miguel A., Pravia-Sarabia, Enrique, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Jiménez-Guerrero, Pedro, &amp; Montávez, Juan Pedro. (2022) "A multivariate-driven approach for disentangling the reduction in near-natural Iberian water resources post-1980" <em>Hydrology and Earth System Sciences</em>, 26, 4251–4263. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022">10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2022) "Changes in compound monthly precipitation and temperature extremes and their relationship with teleconnection patterns in the Mediterranean" <em>Journal of Hydrology</em>, 608, 127580. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580">10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Martin-Vide, Javier, Lopez-Bustins, Joan-Albert, <strong>Lemus, Marc</strong>, Moreno-Garcia, M. Carmen, Balagué, Xavier, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Beguería, Santiago, Peña-Angulo, Dhais, &amp; Trullenque, Víctor. (2022) "The consecutive disparity of precipitation in conterminous Spain" <em>Theoretical and Applied Climatology</em>, 147, 1151–1161. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6">10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2021) "Barcelona intense urban activity greatly limited the role of the atmosphere in driving NO₂ concentration in 2018" <em>Environmental Research Communications</em>, 3(10), 105006. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb">10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Francos, Marcos, &amp; <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2021) "Field observations and remote sensing techniques for evaluation of vegetal recovery after different wildfire severity in a Mediterranean ecosystem" <em>Revista Bosque</em>, 42(2), 245–258.</p>
<div class="pub-meta"><a href="https://revistabosque.org/index.php/bosque/article/view/1058" class="pill">View</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Insua-Costa, Damián, <strong>Lemus-Cánovas, Marc</strong>, Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo, &amp; Llasat, María Carmen. (2021) "Climatology and ranking of hazardous precipitation events in the western Mediterranean area" <em>Atmospheric Research</em>, 255, 105521. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521">10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, &amp; Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert. (2021) "Assessing internal changes in the future structure of dry–hot compound events: the case of the Pyrenees" <em>Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences</em>, 21, 1721–1738. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021">10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert, Martín-Vide, Javier, Halifa-Marin, Amar, Insua-Costa, Damián, Martinez-Artigas, Joan, Trapero, Laura, Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, &amp; Cuadrat, José María. (2021) "Characterisation of Extreme Precipitation Events in the Pyrenees: From the Local to the Synoptic Scale" <em>Atmosphere</em>, 12(6), 665. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos12060665">10.3390/atmos12060665</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.3390/atmos12060665" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos12060665" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Peña-Angulo, Dhais, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Sandonís, Leire, Beguería, Santiago, Tomas-Burguera, Miquel, López-Bustins, Joan Albert, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, &amp; Martin-Vide, Javier. (2021) "Seasonal temperature trends on the Spanish mainland: A secular study (1916–2015)" <em>International Journal of Climatology</em>, 41(5), 3071–3084. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.7006">10.1002/joc.7006</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1002/joc.7006" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.7006" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Martinez-Artigas, Joan, <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, &amp; Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert. (2021) "Precipitation in peninsular Spain: Influence of teleconnection indices and spatial regionalisation" <em>International Journal of Climatology</em>, 41(S1). DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.6770">10.1002/joc.6770</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1002/joc.6770" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.6770" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p>Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., &amp; <strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>. (2020) "The influence of the Western Mediterranean Oscillation upon the spatio-temporal variability of precipitation over Catalonia (northeastern of the Iberian Peninsula)" <em>Atmospheric Research</em>, 236, 104819. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819">10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Martin-Vide, Javier, Moreno-Garcia, M. Carmen, &amp; Lopez-Bustins, Joan A. (2020) "Estimating Barcelona's metropolitan daytime hot and cold poles using Landsat-8 Land Surface Temperature" <em>Science of The Total Environment</em>, 699, 134307. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307">10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Martin-Vide, Javier, &amp; Royé, Dominic. (2019) "synoptReg: An R package for computing a synoptic climate classification and a spatial regionalization of environmental data" <em>Environmental Modelling &amp; Software</em>, 118, 114–119. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006">10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006" class="pill">DOI</a><a href="https://github.com/lemuscanovas/synoptReg" class="pill">GitHub</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Trapero, Laura, &amp; Martin-Vide, Javier. (2019) "Combining circulation weather types and daily precipitation modelling to derive climatic precipitation regions in the Pyrenees" <em>Atmospheric Research</em>, 220, 181–193. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018">10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

<li>
<p><strong>Lemus-Canovas, Marc</strong>, Ninyerola, Miquel, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Manguan, Santiago, &amp; Garcia-Sellés, Carles. (2019) "A mixed application of an objective synoptic classification and spatial regression models for deriving winter precipitation regimes in the Eastern Pyrenees" <em>International Journal of Climatology</em>, 39(4), 2244–2259. DOI: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.5948">10.1002/joc.5948</a></p>
<div class="pub-meta"><span data-badge-type="donut" data-doi="10.1002/joc.5948" class="altmetric-embed"></span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.5948" class="pill">DOI</a></div>
</li>

</ol>

---

## Software

**synoptReg** — R package for computing synoptic climate classifications and spatial regionalization of environmental data.

<div class="pub-meta">
<a href="https://lemuscanovas.github.io/synoptreg/" class="pill">Documentation</a>
<a href="https://github.com/lemuscanovas/synoptReg" class="pill">GitHub</a>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006" class="pill">Paper</a>
<a href="https://cran.r-project.org/package=synoptReg" class="pill">CRAN</a>
</div>

Recognized with the **Best Poster Award** at the 7th International Conference on Meteorology and Climatology of the Mediterranean (MetMed, 2019). Extended to societal applications through a contract with the Civil Protection of the Aragon Government to define a new nivo-climatic regionalization for their avalanche bulletin. Since May 2025, coordinating an international network (KNMI, IPSL, SLF, Oxford) to develop an R/Python package for extreme weather attribution using the flow analogues technique.

---

## Teaching & Supervision

**University teaching:** 270 hours at the University of Barcelona; 42 hours in master's programs

**Courses taught:**  
Three 25-hour courses on spatial data analysis with R, Faculty of Geography and History, University of Barcelona (2019–2021)

**Supervision:**

- 1 Bachelor thesis (Inés Torres Batlló, UB, Spain)
- 2 Master theses (Albert Salvadó Badia, UB, Spain; Bhumi Gagnani, TU Dresden, Germany — HIPEAtMount project)
- Ongoing support to 1 PhD student (Barbara Zennaro, UniBz–EURAC, Italy)

**Other academic activities:**

- Jury member for doctoral thesis of Ema Gaitán Fernández, Universidad San Jorge, Zaragoza (2023)
- Reviewer, Sixth IPCC Assessment Report
- Evaluator for competitive research projects, Spanish State Research Agency (AEI)
- Journal Editor, Special Issues: "Climate change in cold regions" (*Science of The Total Environment*) & "Spatiotemporal Variability of Precipitation Concentration" (*Atmosphere*)
- Organizer, public outreach event *"Calor extrema a Barcelona: Desafiaments climàtics i solucions urbanes"*, Royal Academy of Sciences and Arts of Barcelona

---

*See the [Talks](talks.qmd) page for the full list of conference presentations and invited lectures.*
